title: mexitk
description: mexitk is a MATLAB-ITK bridge: a MEX interface that lets MATLAB call ITK (Insight Segmentation and Registration Toolkit) image filters directly. It is a clean-room reimplementation of the calling convention of MATITK (Chu and Hamarneh, 2005), which is abandoned, has no public source, no licence, and no Apple Silicon build. mexitk was built to unblock MRI segmentation in NFT (Neuroelectromagnetic Forward Modeling Toolbox), an EEG head-modeling EEGLAB plugin that depends on MATITK's calling convention but can no longer run it on modern, Apple Silicon-only Macs. It implements 3 of the original's 40 opcodes (FCA, FOMT, SWS); each opcode publishes its validation status against output captured from the original binary. mexitk reuses no MATITK code and is not endorsed by its authors.

creators.name: Shirazi, Seyed Yahya
creators.affiliation: Swartz Center for Computational Neuroscience, University of California San Diego
